data.title: Strong Encryption Practices
data.description: The website uses strong encryption techniques to ensure that user data is secure in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 with AES 256-bit encryption deployed site-wide.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Employs a web application firewall to protect against common web exploits.
data.technical_spec: WAF rules integrated to filter and monitor HTTP requests in real-time.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Incorporates DDoS mitigation strategies to protect against distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Layer 7 and Layer 4 DDoS protection using cloud-based security services.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify and patch vulnerabilities in its web ecosystem.
data.technical_spec: Quarterly audits conducted using automated tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Secure Authentication Mechanisms
data.description: Implements robust authentication mechanisms to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) enforced for sensitive areas of the site.
